note: Arizona expanded Medicaid (AHCCCS). Adults up to 138% FPL qualify. Apply through HEAplus (now part of ONE DES portal).

programs.name: SNAP (Arizona)
programs.description: Arizona administers federal SNAP (called Nutrition Assistance in AZ). Apply through the ONE DES portal.

programs.name: AHCCCS (Arizona Medicaid)
programs.full_name: Arizona Health Care Cost Containment System — Medicaid
programs.description: Arizona's AHCCCS covers adults up to 138% FPL and children up to 200% FPL. No premium for most enrollees. One of the oldest managed Medicaid programs in the country.

monthly_benefit_range.note: No premium for most enrollees. Managed care model.

income.note: Arizona expanded Medicaid — adults up to 138% FPL qualify through AHCCCS.

programs.name: TPEP (Arizona TANF)
programs.full_name: Temporary Poverty Exemption Program / Arizona TANF
programs.description: Arizona's TANF program provides temporary cash assistance to families with children. A family of 3 receives approximately $278/month. Arizona has strict work requirements and time limits.

income.note: Must be below income limits; 24-hour work requirements apply

eligibility_rules.time_limit: 24-month state lifetime limit (Arizona is stricter than federal 60 months)
